name: Breath Mask
description: Portable atmosphere filter providing breathable air for ~1 hour; no temperature or vacuum protection

name: Comlink
description: Short-range personal communicator; ~50km range; supports encrypted frequencies

name: Datapad
description: Handheld electronic data storage and retrieval device

name: Glow Rod
description: Portable illumination device; projects light beam up to 50m

name: Hush-About Jet Pack
description: Silent personal jet pack; lifts 300kg; 10 charges; 200m vertical / 500m horizontal per charge

name: Macrobinoculars
description: Image-magnification device; enhances vision up to 1km; +3D to search/Perception beyond 100m

name: Medpac
description: Emergency medical kit for field trauma treatment; single use; requires first aid roll

name: Recording Rod
description: Cylindrical audio-visual recorder; 15m range; stores 100 hours; reusable

name: Rocket Pack
description: Chemical-fuel personal rocket pack; works in vacuum; 12 charges; 70m vertical / 160m horizontal per charge

name: Sensor Pack
description: Handheld scanner detecting life-forms or comm signals; +1D to sensors; 300m range

name: Space Suit
description: Sealed suit with atmosphere / heat / food supply; 10 days survival; -2D to all DEX checks

name: Vacuum Suit
description: Lightweight flight suit with 10 hours atmosphere; no heating; STR/stamina check hourly in vacuum

name: Syntherope Dispenser
description: Dispenser of high-strength synthetic cable; supports up to 500kg
